positive: A vibrant, stylized composition featuring a grouping of whimsical jungle animals (monkeys, toucans, sloths, and playful jaguars) engaged in joyful exploration in a lush, stylized tropical setting. The style should be clean vector illustration meets modern flat design with highly saturated, contrasting jewel tones (emerald green, sapphire blue, magenta, and sunny yellow). The composition must be centrally arranged, with strong silhouettes and dynamic negative space, perfect for repeating apparel patterns. Focus on sharp lines, thick outlines, and clear visibility of each subject. Sunlight dappling through stylized foliage, creating high contrast and clean, solid color blocks. Artwork should be extremely crisp and suitable for commercial textile printing.
negative: blurry, grainy, noisy, artifact, watermark, text, logos, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, fused objects, muted colors, low contrast, cartoonish, photographic
